title: Fresh Flaky Butter Crumble
description: A festive and fresh flaky dish featuring butter that's perfect for adding a mediterranean twist to any meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: Use cold, freshly ground flour for best results.

ingredients.name: 3/4 cup unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's softened to a spreadable consistency.

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine flour and salt. Add softened butter and pinch of sugar using your fingers or a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse breadcrumbs.
Transfer the crumble onto an ungreased baking sheet and bake for about 12-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Let it cool slightly before serving.
